nasb.text: A man with an evil eye hastens after wealth And does not know that want will come upon him.

esv.text: A stingy man  hastens after wealth and does not know that poverty will come upon him.

cnv.text: 吝嗇的人急切求財， 卻不知窮乏快要臨到。

ccb.text: 贪婪的人急于发财， 却不知贫穷即将临到。

csbs.text: 贪婪的人，急切要发财， 但他不明白穷乏将临到他。
